frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment: Honestly yaar, girls look way better in simple saree or salwar, much more decent and classy. These super flashy western outfits just give a different impression only, then people will obviously stare.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it links a woman's clothing to her character and perceived respectability, framing traditional dress as 'decent' and western dress as inviting attention. It encodes backhanded praise of traditional wear and subtly blames harassment on what women wear.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
